top3.sql:
SELECT l.name, COUNT(*) AS game_count
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
WHERE m.season = '2015-2016'
GROUP BY l.id, l.name
ORDER BY game_count DESC
LIMIT 4;

SELECT l.name
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
WHERE m.season = '2015-2016'
GROUP BY l.name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 4;

SELECT l.name, COUNT(*) AS game_count
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
WHERE m.season = '2015-2016'
GROUP BY l.id, l.name
ORDER BY game_count DESC
LIMIT 4;

WITH LeagueGameCounts AS (
  SELECT l.name, COUNT(*) AS game_count
  FROM Match m
  JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
  WHERE m.season = '2015-2016'
  GROUP BY l.id, l.name
)
SELECT name
FROM LeagueGameCounts
ORDER BY game_count DESC
LIMIT 4;

SELECT l.name
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
WHERE m.season = '2015-2016'
GROUP BY l.name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 4;

SELECT l.name, COUNT(*) AS game_count
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
WHERE m.season = '2015-2016'
GROUP BY l.id, l.name
ORDER BY game_count DESC
LIMIT 4;

WITH LeagueGameCounts AS (
  SELECT l.name, COUNT(*) AS game_count
  FROM Match m
  JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
  WHERE m.season = '2015-2016'
  GROUP BY l.id, l.name

SELECT name

LIMIT 4;

SELECT l.name
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
WHERE m.season = '2015-2016'
GROUP BY l.name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 4;

final.sql:
SELECT l.name, COUNT(*) AS game_count
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
WHERE m.season = '2015-2016'
GROUP BY l.id, l.name
ORDER BY game_count DESC
LIMIT 4;
